title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: CARES NORTHWEST CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessment services for children with concerns of abuse or neglect, including medical examinations, forensic interviews, referral services, and trauma-focused therapy. Offers training, consultation, and referrals for professionals in the field. Also provides prevention education for professionals and the general public. 2800 N Vancouver Avenue Suite 201 Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 who are suspected victims of abuse, domestic violence, or neglect Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 276-9000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 276-9000 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information FEES: Varies by service. No one turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah and Washington Counties Services: Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - CARES NORTHWEST If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CARES NORTHWEST
